flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 26% at Franklin Pierce University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.1k vs 1.4k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Franklin Pierce University fell 22% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3k → 992).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Franklin Pierce University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($42.1k → $46.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Franklin Pierce University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($42.1k → $46.4k).
